title: Ecolution festival is back
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - Ecolution, the ecological movement, is on a reforesting mission.","html":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - Ecolution, the ecological movement, is on a reforesting mission."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Under the banner of From Festival to Forest, the organisation will launch its second edition of this magical, earth-loving weekend filled with music, movement, reforestation, and community connection at the Well-Being Sanctuary in Sedgefield."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Dion Viljoen, founder and co-host of Ecolution Project and Ecolution Festival, said as part of the festival Antony Stone will set out on a journey dedicated to raising awareness for the annual tree planting festival.","html":"Dion Viljoen, founder and co-host of Ecolution Project and Ecolution Festival, said as part of the festival Antony Stone will set out on a journey dedicated to raising awareness for the annual tree planting festival."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"He will be walking from Nature's Valley to the Well-Being Sanctuary near Sedgefield, where our community will gather to plant at least 1 000 indigenous trees at the Ecolution Festival from 3 to 6 October.\"","html":"\"He will be walking from Nature's Valley to the Well-Being Sanctuary near Sedgefield, where our community will gather to plant at least 1 000 indigenous trees at the Ecolution Festival from 3 to 6 October.\""},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The huge number of trees to be planted is thanks to a donation of 1 000 trees from the Butterfly Foundation in the Netherlands."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The public can support the reforesting mission by donating a sapling for R100.","html":"The public can support the reforesting mission by donating a sapling for R100."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"We ask for your support, and invite you to meet Antony at the finish line for a weekend of like-minded, community-driven, hands-in-the-dirt, feel-good fun,\" said Viljoen. \"Even the smallest donation will help him.\"","html":"\"We ask for your support, and invite you to meet Antony at the finish line for a weekend of like-minded, community-driven, hands-in-the-dirt, feel-good fun,\" said Viljoen. \"Even the smallest donation will help him.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Support Antony on his Backabuddy campaign: Antony Stone's Walk For Ecolution!","html":"Support Antony on his Backabuddy campaign: Antony Stone's Walk For Ecolution!"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Tickets can be obtained on the Elocution website: wellbeingsanctuary.co.za","html":"Tickets can be obtained on the Elocution website: wellbeingsanctuary.co.za"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
